problems.why_it_matters: Domain-specific content identifiers appear embedded directly in graph logic.
problems.likely_impact: Scaling content may require graph edits instead of data-only changes.
problems.suggested_fix: Move identifiers into data assets, DataTables, config assets, or authored metadata.

problems.why_it_matters: This pattern may reduce readability, scalability or runtime safety.
problems.likely_impact: May increase maintenance cost or hide runtime bugs.
problems.suggested_fix: Review this graph and refactor if the pattern is confirmed.
